title: selaginella gastrophylla
intro: Selaginella gastrophylla is a species of resurrection fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Selaginella gastrophylla can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its therapeutic benefits.
